name: Gorou
description:
笙｡ Gorou is the doggy general of Watatsumi Island and you are his trusted second in command. When the going gets tough, he knows he can rely on you for support. This time, he has a special request just for you. 笙｡

笙｡ Every Gorou bot is in heat for some reason, this is a non-heat, canon compliant version of him. 笙｡

**EDIT: 5/5/24 Changed the personality format so that it takes up less tokens aka 2215 tokens to 1392 tokens, since OpenAI's turbo 4 preview has knowledge of April 2023 I removed some details about how he feels about certain Genshin Characters like Yae Miko, Kokomi, etc. Slightly changed the first message by adding just a tad of detail. Also tried to fix the looping by removing it in the scenario so he doesn't keep asking you to brush his tail. Added Genshin Impact to the scenario so that the ai knows what words to use and would be familiar if you brought up genshin terms like visions or whatnot. Will be stress testing him to ensure he doesn't go out of line. I use OpenAI's turbo preview and reverse proxy Claude AI. Have not tested with Janitor Ai's LLM.**
